gui.redstone-master.title: Redstone Master
gui.redstone-master.main_menu.title_suff: is a client-side Fabric mod for Minecraft 1.21.11.
gui.redstone-master.main_menu.body:
WHAT IT IS
An in-game redstone tutor: components, signal strength, circuits, and tips for hands-on practice.

WHY USE IT
Learn mechanics without leaving the game: lessons with text, images, pseudo-video, and hints for experiments in Creative or Survival.

HOW TO USE
• Open the window with ] (rebind in Minecraft Settings → Controls → Redstone Master). While you type text — chat, signs, Creative search, recipe book, or mod search fields — ] will not open the mod.
• Tutorial — search, sections ◀/▼, «Study», pseudo-video, lesson comments (sign-in required for comments).
• Settings — window size, background transparency (slider 0–100%), language, pause, remember tab and scroll, search within settings.
• Profile — sign in via the website, sync lesson progress and avatar (requires the web app running; see webBaseUrl in config).
• Navigation history — mouse buttons 4 (back) and 5 (forward).
• Close: X, Esc, or press ] again (if enabled in settings).

WEBSITE
Companion web app: tutorial catalog, profile, news, moderation. Mod sign-in opens the browser; set webBaseUrl in config/redstone-master.json (default http://localhost:8080).

THANKS
To the Minecraft community, Minecraft Wiki authors, the Fabric team, and Mojang.

SOURCES
Lessons are based on open Minecraft Wiki material (CC BY-SA): minecraft.wiki, ru.minecraft.wiki. See docs/TUTORIAL_SOURCES.md in the mod repository.

MORE
Client-only — no server mod needed. Config: config/redstone-master.json. Repository: github.com/SvoNaR/redstone-master. Happy building!
gui.redstone-master.tutorial.disclaimer: * The ◀ button left of each section opens the lesson list (it becomes ▼). A short topic overview appears under the section title; «Study» on a lesson opens the full guide with images and in-world practice tips.
gui.redstone-master.tutorial.video.insta: We are currently installing this lesson for you!
gui.redstone-master.settings.disclaimer: * Some settings have tooltips — hover the control on the right. Background transparency uses a slider. Search is the top field on the tab.
gui.redstone-master.settings.tutorial_co: When enabled, expanding one section collapses the others. When disabled, multiple sections can stay open.
gui.redstone-master.settings.background_: 100% is fully transparent. 75% is the default. 0% is an opaque black background. Drag the slider left or right.
gui.redstone-master.settings.pause_on_op: In singleplayer, pauses the world while the mod window is open. Has no effect in multiplayer.
gui.redstone-master.settings.auto_langua: Uses the same language as Minecraft for mod text. When enabled, manual language selection is disabled.
gui.redstone-master.settings.remember_se: When enabled, reopening the mod restores the last tab and settings scroll. When disabled, the mod always opens on the main menu at the top.
gui.redstone-master.settings.close_on_re: Close mod on repeat key press
When enabled, pressing the open key again (default ]) closes the mod. When disabled, use the X button or Esc to close.
gui.redstone-master.settings.reset.toolt: Reset this setting to its default value
gui.redstone-master.settings.reset_all.m: All mod settings will be restored to their defaults. This cannot be undone.
gui.redstone-master.profile.guest_hint: Sign in or register to link your mod profile with the website account.
gui.redstone-master.profile.waiting_brow: Complete sign-in in your browser. Your mod profile will open afterward.
gui.redstone-master.profile.auth.error: Could not complete sign-in. Make sure the website is running and try again.
gui.redstone-master.profile.auth.error.w: Could not reach the website. Start the web app and check webBaseUrl in config/redstone-master.json.
gui.redstone-master.profile.auth.error.b: Could not open the browser. Open the website manually and sign in.
